current_location: Field Museum, Chicago, United States

current_location: Brookfield Zoo, Chicago, United States

current_location: Brookfield Zoo, Chicago, United States
intro: Historic Brookfield Zoo giant panda that followed Su Lin and Mei-Mei and remained a Brookfield favorite until the early 1950s.

current_location: Bronx Zoo, New York, United States
intro: Bronx Zoo's first giant panda and a major 1938-1941 New York attraction, including the 1939-1940 World's Fair period.
notes: WCS Archives confirms Pandora as the Society's first giant panda and her May 1941 death; exact birth and death day need primary annual-report or studbook source.

current_location: Bronx Zoo, New York, United States

current_location: Bronx Zoo, New York, United States

notes: WCS confirms Pan-dee/Pan-dah arrival and both female sex; Cunningham supplies Pan-dee's 1945-10-04 death from New York Times archive context. PandaNews agrees on female sex and October 1945 death month; primary NYZS annual report/studbook still preferred.

current_location: Bronx Zoo, New York, United States
intro: Female giant panda gifted by Madame Chiang Kai-shek to the Bronx Zoo; later also known as Susie.

PandaNews agrees on October 1951 death month but lists male sex, conflicting with WCS/Cunningham; sex kept female pending primary NYZS annual report/studbook confirmation.
